_schema: ai-minerals canonical ML version manifest. Goldbug reads this in place of parsing model rasters' filenames. Bare-semver strings (no 'v' prefix). Update when any listed model bumps version.

notes.placer: v3.7.0 = Mother-Lode-wide Quaternary retrain (USMIN labels + channel-aligned anisotropic Gaussian kernel along NHD HR; full Mother Lode geography). Tertiary unchanged from v3.6. Per-region p90 jumps 8-13x in southern counties; coverage mask expands from 1.6% to 27.3% of AOI. Mariposa per-county MRDS-held-out gate fails (4 USMIN records too few); v3.7.0.1 patch queued.
notes.lode: Mother Lode lode-Au RF (Cox-Singer porphyry + orogenic positives across CA). No version bump planned in v1.x.
notes.lookalike: Within-region similarity-based scoring used by goldbug. No version bump planned in v1.x.
